channel.title: Sorting, Stacking & Plugging Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in Sorting, Stacking & Plugging Toys on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck Bin Lorry Toy Learning and Colour Sorting Toys for 2+ Year old Toddlers and Kids Develop Fine Motor Skills Set 10987
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck Bin Lorry Toy Learning and Colour Sorting Toys for 2+ Year old Toddlers and Kids Develop Fine Motor Skills Set 10987 here: ℹ️: The drivable bin lorry toy features a tipping function and comes with 3 colourful sorting toy bins with hinged lids to teach kids about recycling This activity-packed colour sorting truck toy makes a fab birthday or any-day gift for toddlers and kids aged 2+ who love drivable vehicles A great learning toy for toddlers; the set also includes a refuse worker LEGO DUPLO figure with a broom and a puppy toy animal figure Children develop their fine motor skills and get familiar with colours as they open and close the toy bins to tidy away the colour-matching bricks Help your toddler keep the streets tidy with the LEGO DUPLO Town Recycling Truck toy for 2+ year olds, which teaches about colour matching 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO DUPLO Town Train Bridge and Tracks Toy for Kids Building Bricks Set with Horn Sound Action Brick Trains Rails Extension Set 10872
item.description: You’ve got LEGO DUPLO Town Train Bridge and Tracks Toy for Kids Building Bricks Set with Horn Sound Action Brick Trains Rails Extension Set 10872 at the following link: ℹ️: The tracks included in this set are compatible with your child’s existing LEGO DUPLO train collection. Includes a construction worker LEGO DUPLO figure with spade and suitcase accessory elements. Show your child how easy it is to place the yellow action brick on the track to make any compatible LEGO DUPLO train, such as the 10874 Steam Train or 10875 Cargo Train, sound the horn as it passes over.
